nasb.text: and charges her with shameful deeds and publicly defames her, and says, ‘I took this woman, but when I came near her, I did not find her a virgin,’

esv.text: and accuses her of misconduct and brings a bad name upon her, saying, ‘I took this woman, and when I came near her, I did not find in her evidence of virginity,’

cnv.text: 捏造可恥的事毀謗她，破壞她的名譽，說：‘我娶了這個女子，和她親近的時候，發現她沒有貞潔的憑據。’

ccb.text: 诽谤她，说，‘我娶她时，发现她已经不是处女’，
